name: The Tips Performance Golf
about: The Tips Performance Golf is a golf training and fitness facility offering 24/7 access to advanced swing analysis technology and a comprehensive fitness center. Members can utilize the Trackman Bay with Trackman Studio for detailed swing data and AI-powered swing analysis. The facility is equipped with a full fitness center featuring free weights, resistance training equipment, and cardio machines. Membership options include a basic plan with facility access and an elite plan that adds monthly golf lessons and personal training sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Comprehensive fitness and golf training combined
AI-powered swing analysis for detailed feedback
Multiple membership tiers to suit different goals

simulator_hardware.notes: Radar-based launch monitor with comprehensive data tracking and AI swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify, but members typically bring their own clubs for use with the Trackman simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink?
faq.answer: No information about food and drink policies is provided on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Website doesn't specify simulator time per round, but 24/7 access allows for flexible practice sessions.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No specific information about child-friendly features or junior programs is mentioned.
